revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:йҳҝдҝқзҘһзӨҫ (зҘһе·қз”ә)]] {{Expand Japanese|йҳҝдҝқзҘһзӨҫ (зҘһе·қз”ә)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Abo Shrine | native_name = йҳҝдҝқзҘһзӨҫ | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Abo Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.226527777777775|139.1004722222222}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|ЕҢkuninushi|lt=ЕҢkuninushi|ca|ЕҢkuninushi|en|ЕҢkuninushi|es|ЕҢkuninushi|fa|Ш§ЩҲЪ©ЩҲЩҶЫҢЩҶЩҲШҙЫҢ|fr|ЕҢkuninushi|hu|Г“kuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|ЕҢkuninushi|ja|еӨ§еӣҪдё»|ko|мҳӨмҳӨмҝ лӢҲлҲ„мӢң|mni|кҜ‘кҜЈкҜҖкҜЁкҜ…кҜӨкҜ…кҜЁкҜҒкҜӨ|pl|ЕҢkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|РһРәСғРҪРёРҪСғСҒРё|simple|ЕҢkuninushi|sr|OkuninuЕЎi|sv|ЕҢkuninushi|tr|ЕҢkuninushi|uk|РһРәСғРҪС–РҪСғСҲС–|vi|ЕҢkuninushi|zh|еӨ§еңӢдё»|qid=Q276944|1=ЕҢkuninushi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Abo Shrine'''|йҳҝдҝқзҘһзӨҫ}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki JinmyЕҚchЕҚ]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|Ш¬ЩҠЩҶШ¬Ш§|arz|Ш¶ШұЩҠШӯ ШҙЩҶШӘЩҲ|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Е intoistickГЎ pyhГӨkkГ¶|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ®аӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨ°|hr|Е intoistiДҚki hram|hu|SintГі szentГ©ly|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|зҘһзӨҫ|ka|бғ«бғҳбғңбғ«бғҳбғҗ|ko|мӢ мӮ¬ (мӢ нҶ )|lb|ShintЕҚ-SchrГӨin|mr|аӨ¶аӨҝаӨӮаӨӨаҘӢ аӨ®аӨӮаӨҰаӨҝаӨ°|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|а¬ңа¬ҝа¬һаӯҚа¬ңа¬ҫ|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoГӯsta|ru|Р”Р·РёРҪРҙР·СҸ|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto BбәЈn|vibooks|CГЎc quб»‘c gia/Nhбәӯt BбәЈn|vivoyage|Nhбәӯt BбәЈn|vls|Japan|vo|YapГӨn|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|SapoЕӢ|wuu|ж—Ҙжң¬|xal|РқРёxСғСғРҙРёРҪ РқСғСӮРі|xh|IJapani|xmf|бғҳбғҗбғһбғқбғңбғҳбғҗ|yi|ЧҷЧҗЧӨЧҗЧҹ|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|вөҸвөүвҙұвө“вөҸ|zh_classical|ж—Ҙжң¬|zh_min_nan|JiМҚt-pГәn|zh_yue|ж—Ҙжң¬|zh|ж—Ҙжң¬|zhnews|Category:ж—Ҙжң¬|zhquote|ж—Ҙжң¬|zhvoyage|ж—Ҙжң¬|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * гҒӮгҒјгҒҳгӮ“гҒҳгӮғhttps://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == postal code (P281) == * 367-0247https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6030005009202 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Imakiawoyasakainamino Shrine|lt=Imakiawoyasakainamino Shrine|qid=Q135039746|1=Imakiawoyasakainamino Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|и«–зӨҫ|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': 'еҹјзҺүзңҢе…җзҺүйғЎзҘһе·қз”әеӨ§еӯ—е…ғйҳҝдҝқеӯ—дёҠе…ӯжүҖ1', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': 'еҹјзҺүзңҢе…җзҺүйғЎдёҠйҮҢз”әдә”жҳҺ', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:йҳҝдҝқзҘһзӨҫ (зҘһе·қз”ә)]] {{wikidata link|Q85884328}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Abo Shrine |Image = {{Image requested|cat=Kodama District}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Saitama Prefecture|Q128186|qid=Q128186|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kodama District|Q938038|qid=Q938038|1=Kodama District, Saitama}}{{ill|lt=Kamikawa Town|Q1346757|qid=Q1346757|1=Kamikawa, Saitama}} ЕҢaza Moto-Abo, Aza KamirokushЕҚ 1 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|ЕҢnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=ЕҢnamuchi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q276944|1=ЕҢkuninushi}}
{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|qid=Q682306}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|1=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|qid=Q1056017}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=ЕҢmiyanome-ЕҢkami|1=ЕҢmiya-no-Me|qid=Q24865597}}
{{ill|lt=Futsunomitama|Q11059754|qid=Q11059754|lt=Furu-ЕҢkami|1=Futsu-no-mitama}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = A disputed shrine of an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor shrine)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = {{ill|lt=Enryaku|Q1373176|qid=Q1373176|1=Enryaku}} 3 (784) |Chief priest = |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Alternative name = Rokusho MyЕҚjin |Pilgrimage etc. = |Annual festival = October 19 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Saitama|label=Abo Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Abo Shrine''' (гҒӮгҒјгҒҳгӮ“гҒҳгӮғ) is a Shinto shrine located along the {{ill|lt=Kamikawa River|Q11589669|qid=Q11589669|1=Kamikawa River}} in {{ill|lt=Kamikawa Town|Q1346757|qid=Q1346757|1=Kamikawa, Saitama}}, {{ill|lt=Kodama District|Q938038|qid=Q938038|1=Kodama District, Saitama}}, {{ill|lt=Saitama Prefecture|Q128186|qid=Q128186|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. The enshrined deities are six in number: ЕҢnamuchi-no-Mikoto, Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Izanami-no-Mikoto, Ninigi-no-Mikoto, ЕҢmiyanome-ЕҢkami, and Furu-ЕҢkami. It is a disputed candidate for the Shikinaisha minor shrine вҖңImajo Aozaka Inami ShrineвҖқ of {{ill|lt=Musashi Province|Q907398|qid=Q907398|1=Musashi Province}}, {{ill|lt=Kami District|Q11634927|qid=Q11634927|1=Kami district}}. Its former shrine rank was village shrine. === History === In Enryaku 3 (784), {{ill|lt=Abo no Asomi Hitokami|Q50641391|qid=Q50641391|lt=Abo no Asomi Hitokami|1=Abo no Asomi Hitokami}} of Abo Village in {{ill|lt=Iga Province|Q1047128|qid=Q1047128|1=Iga Province}} founded вҖңImajo Aozaka Inami Shrine.вҖқ The village name вҖңAbo VillageвҖқ is said to derive from a village of the same name in his home province; the shrine name вҖңImajoвҖқ refers to the construction of a single fort, and вҖңAozakaвҖқ is said to originate from the sound-similar word вҖңaoвҖқ (blue) to Abo. From the old document вҖңMeisaichЕҚвҖқ of Imajo Aozaka Inami Ikegami Shrine Abo no Asomi Hitokami later became вҖңGovernor of MusashiвҖқ (provincial governor of Musashi Province) on the 8th day of the 8th month of Enryaku 5 (786),From the entry for the 8th month, kinoshi day, Enryaku 5 (786) in *Shoku Nihongi*: вҖңJunior Fifth Rank, Upper, Abo no Asomi Hitokami appointed Governor of Musashi.вҖқ and on the 6th day of the 2nd month of Enryaku 9 (790) he became вҖңDirector of the Imperial UniversityвҖқ (equivalent to a modern university president).From the entry for the 7th month, tsuchinoe-ne day, Enryaku 9 (790) in *Shoku Nihongi*: вҖңJunior Fifth Rank, Upper, Abo no Asomi Hitokami appointed Director of the Imperial University.вҖқ In JishЕҚ 4 (1180), {{ill|lt=Abo Sanemitsu|Q11450275|qid=Q11450275|lt=Abo JirЕҚ Sanemitsu|1=Abo Sanemitsu}} constructed the shrine buildings. In TenshЕҚ 5 (1577), Sekiguchi Village was separated from Abo Village. Sekiguchi Village transferred the вҖңNiu Shrine,вҖқ which had been enshrined behind вҖңRokusho MyЕҚjin ShrineвҖқ (this shrine), from Abo Village to Sekiguchi Village and made it the tutelary shrine of Sekiguchi Village (present-day вҖңImajo Aozaka Inami Ikegami ShrineвҖқ). In Bunsei 1 (1818), villagers rebuilt this shrine, which had fallen into ruin. During the Edo period, the shrine was known as вҖңRokusho MyЕҚjin Shrine.вҖқ On May 3, Meiji 43 (1910), the Inari Shrine at Inari-juku, which was regarded as a disputed candidate for the Shikinaisha вҖңImajo Aozaka Inami Aramitama Shrine,вҖқ was merged into this shrine, and the shrine name was changed to the current вҖңAbo Shrine.вҖқ '''Shrine rank''' * KyЕҚhЕҚ 12 (1727) вҖ“ Senior First Rank (Rokusho DaimyЕҚjin) * TaishЕҚ 5 (1926), December 23 вҖ“ Shrine authorized to receive offerings of sacred food and ritual implements === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=ЕҢkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=ЕҢnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=ЕҢkuninushi}} (гҒҠгҒҠгҒӘгӮҖгҒЎгҒ®гҒҝгҒ“гҒЁ) * {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} (гҒҷгҒ•гҒ®гҒҠгҒ®гҒҝгҒ“гҒЁ) * {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} (гҒ„гҒ–гҒӘгҒҝгҒ®гҒҝгҒ“гҒЁ) * {{ill|lt=Ninigi|Q1056017|qid=Q1056017|lt=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|1=Ninigi-no-Mikoto}} (гҒ«гҒ«гҒҺгҒ®гҒҝгҒ“гҒЁ) * {{ill|lt=ЕҢmiyanome|Q24865597|qid=Q24865597|lt=ЕҢmiyanome-ЕҢkami|1=ЕҢmiya-no-Me}} (гҒҠгҒҠгҒҝгӮ„гҒ®гӮҒ) * {{ill|lt=Futsunomitama|Q11059754|qid=Q11059754|lt=Furunomitama-ЕҢkami|1=Futsu-no-mitama}} (гҒөгӮӢгҒ®гҒҝгҒҹгҒҫгҒ®гҒҠгҒҠгҒӢгҒҝ) === Subsidiary shrines === * Kofumine Shrine * TenmangЕ« * Kokage ЕҢkami, Shinmei Shrine, Inari ЕҢkami, Hakusan Shrine, Yasaka Shrine, JЕ«niten Shrine === Access === * From the bus stop вҖңTanshЕҚ StationвҖқ at JR HachikЕҚ Line TanshЕҚ Station, take the Asahi Bus вҖңHonjЕҚвҖ“Jinsen Line.вҖқ Get off at вҖңMoto-AboвҖқ bus stop and walk 20 minutes. * From JR Takasaki Line HonjЕҚ Station, take the Asahi Bus вҖңHonjЕҚвҖ“Jinsen Line.вҖқ Get off at вҖңMoto-AboвҖқ bus stop and walk 20 minutes. === Notes === {{Notes help}} {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Abo Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Abo
